AUTH001.message: Account locked due to multiple failed login attempts
AUTH001.cause: User exceeded the maximum number of failed login attempts (usually 3-5). Common on government portals with strict security policies.
AUTH001.resolution:
1. Wait 30 minutes for automatic unlock (if supported)
2. Use 'Forgot Password' flow with registered email/phone
3. If Aadhaar-linked: try biometric re-authentication
4. Contact portal helpdesk with identity verification

AUTH002.cause: SMS/email OTP delivery failure due to network issues, DND settings, wrong phone number, or portal SMS gateway delays.
AUTH002.resolution:
1. Verify registered mobile number
2. Check for DND settings blocking transactional SMS
3. Wait 2-3 minutes before requesting resend
4. Try email OTP if SMS fails
5. Contact telecom provider if persistent

AUTH003.message: Digital signature certificate not detected or invalid
AUTH003.cause: DSC USB token not plugged in, drivers not installed, certificate expired, or browser plugin not active.
AUTH003.resolution:
1. Insert USB token before opening portal
2. Install vendor drivers and signing utility
3. Check certificate validity in certmgr.msc
4. Try Internet Explorer or Edge browser

FORM001.message: Form validation failed — required fields incomplete
FORM001.cause: Mandatory fields are empty, date format mismatch, special characters in name fields, or file upload exceeds size limit.
FORM001.resolution:
1. Check all fields marked with * (mandatory)
2. Verify date format matches portal requirement (DD/MM/YYYY)
3. Remove special characters from name fields
4. Reduce file size for uploads

FORM002.cause: A previous application with the same credentials/purpose already exists in the system. Most portals prevent duplicate submissions.
FORM002.resolution:
1. Check 'My Applications' for existing submissions
2. Withdraw previous application if allowed
3. Contact helpdesk for manual cancellation
4. Wait for previous application to complete processing

PAY001.message: Payment transaction failed or timed out
PAY001.cause: Payment gateway timeout, insufficient balance, card not enabled for online transactions, 3D Secure failure, or bank server downtime.
PAY001.resolution:
1. Do NOT retry if money was deducted
2. Check bank statement for debit
3. Wait 24-48 hours for auto-reconciliation
4. Note transaction reference number
5. Create refund request if double-charged

PAY002.message: Payment receipt not generated after successful transaction
PAY002.cause: Browser closed before payment confirmation page loaded, or portal failed to update payment status despite successful bank debit.
PAY002.resolution:
1. Check 'Payment History' in portal dashboard
2. Check bank statement for transaction status
3. Wait 24-48 hours for reconciliation
4. Use transaction reference to raise query with portal support

DOC001.cause: File exceeds size limit, wrong format, incorrect dimensions for photos, or filename contains special characters.
DOC001.resolution:
1. Reduce file to < 2MB
2. Convert to accepted format (PDF/JPG)
3. For photos: 600x600px or as specified
4. Rename file without special characters

DOC002.message: Certificate or receipt download not working
DOC002.cause: Popup blocker preventing download, browser incompatibility, or document not yet generated by the portal.
DOC002.resolution:
1. Disable popup blocker for portal domain
2. Try right-click > Save link as
3. Check Downloads folder
4. Try different browser (Chrome/Firefox)

STAT001.cause: Application is in processing queue, additional documents required but notification not received, or portal status sync delay.
STAT001.resolution:
1. Verify standard processing timeline
2. Check email (including spam) for requests
3. Verify all documents were uploaded
4. Contact helpdesk if beyond standard timeline

TECH001.cause: Server overload, maintenance window, or backend system failure. Common during peak filing/application seasons.
TECH001.resolution:
1. Check portal status page for known outages
2. Try during off-peak hours (early morning)
3. Clear cache and try incognito mode
4. Try different browser

TECH002.cause: Government portals typically have 15-20 minute session timeouts for security. Inactivity or multiple tabs can trigger early timeout.
TECH002.resolution:
1. Prepare all information before starting form
2. Use Save Draft button frequently
3. Keep only one tab open
4. Check for auto-saved drafts

TECH003.cause: Portal requires specific browser features, Java/ActiveX plugins, or is not optimized for the user's browser version.
TECH003.resolution:
1. Use Chrome or Firefox (latest version)
2. For legacy portals: try IE/Edge in IE mode
3. Install required plugins (Java, signing utilities)
4. Disable hardware acceleration

VISA001.message: DS-160 application error or data loss
VISA001.cause: Session timeout on CEAC portal, photo upload rejection, or form validation error on the US visa DS-160 form.
VISA001.resolution:
1. Note Application ID (AA00XXXXXX) to resume
2. Photo: 600x600px, JPEG, < 240KB
3. Use 'Retrieve Application' to continue
4. Print confirmation/barcode page

VISA002.message: Schengen visa appointment or documentation error
VISA002.cause: No appointment slots available, incomplete documentation, or tracking number not working on VFS/BLS portal.
VISA002.resolution:
1. Check slot release schedule for the consulate
2. Try different VFS center locations
3. Verify complete document checklist
4. Travel insurance must cover 30,000 EUR minimum

ID001.cause: Name/DOB mismatch between Aadhaar and target system, biometric lock enabled, or mobile number not registered with Aadhaar.
ID001.resolution:
1. Check name/DOB match exactly
2. Disable biometric lock in mAadhaar app
3. Update mobile at enrolment center
4. For PAN link: fix mismatch in Aadhaar first

ID002.cause: No appointment slots at PSK/POPSK, document verification issues, or application form errors on Passport Seva portal.
ID002.resolution:
1. Try slots at different PSK locations
2. Check early morning for new releases
3. Bring original documents to appointment
4. For Tatkal: additional fee and limited slots

LANG001.message: Portal content not available in user's language
LANG001.cause: Language selector not working, or portal does not support the user's preferred language. Auto-translation may corrupt form inputs.
LANG001.resolution:
1. Check language selector (usually top-right)
2. Use browser translate carefully
3. Do NOT auto-translate form field values
4. Look for separate regional language portal

APPT001.message: Appointment slot unavailable or booking failed
APPT001.cause: All slots booked, portal capacity reached, or session expired during booking process.
APPT001.resolution:
1. Check when new slots are released
2. Try different locations
3. Check 'My Appointments' if page crashed
4. Don't refresh rapidly — triggers rate limiting

PROF001.message: Profile update rejected or field locked
PROF001.cause: Critical fields (name, DOB, nationality) are locked after verification. Changes require supporting documents and may need in-person verification.
PROF001.resolution:
1. Check if 'Request Change' option exists
2. For name change: provide legal documents
3. For Aadhaar-linked: update Aadhaar first
4. Some changes require service center visit

LOGIN.name: Portal Login
LOGIN.description: Standard login page with username/email and password or OTP authentication

REGISTRATION.name: New User Registration
REGISTRATION.description: Account creation page requiring personal details, email/mobile verification

DASHBOARD.name: User Dashboard
DASHBOARD.description: Main landing page after login showing applications, notifications, and action items

APPLICATION_FORM.name: Application Form
APPLICATION_FORM.description: Multi-step form for submitting applications (visa, tax, permits)

DOCUMENT_UPLOAD.name: Document Upload
DOCUMENT_UPLOAD.description: File upload interface for supporting documents, photos, and certificates

PAYMENT_GATEWAY.name: Payment Gateway
PAYMENT_GATEWAY.description: Payment processing page for fees (visa, tax, application charges)

STATUS_TRACKING.name: Application Status Tracking
STATUS_TRACKING.description: Page showing application progress and current status

APPOINTMENT_BOOKING.name: Appointment Booking
APPOINTMENT_BOOKING.description: Calendar/slot selection for in-person visits (embassy, PSK, verification center)

PROFILE_SETTINGS.name: Profile / Account Settings
PROFILE_SETTINGS.description: User profile management for personal details, contact info, security settings

HELP_FAQ.name: Help / FAQ Section
HELP_FAQ.description: Portal help documentation and frequently asked questions
